title: Tutor's Gentle Trap
description:
Tutor's Gentle Trap - An Immersive Visual Interactive Novel. 
Core Plot Introduction
In 2025, Thomas died with hatred in the VIP ward of New York Presbyterian Hospital, but his soul was reconstructed by digital life. Looking back three years ago, he and his tutor, Elena, went from the initial innocent ambiguity to getting involved in a crazy 'Reward Game'. However, Elena was secretly planning a 'Flesh Sacrifice Revenge' behind the scenes. 
Worldview Atmosphere
The story intertwines real - world and science - fiction elements. There is both a luxurious villa life and a mysterious digital life world. Elena's revenge plan unfolds quietly in the seemingly peaceful family life, full of an atmosphere of suspense and conspiracy.
Highlights of Female Character Interaction
Elena seduces Thomas with a gentle image, and the two have intimate interactions in scenes such as the study and the kitchen. Elena skillfully controls the rhythm of the 'Reward Game', satisfying Thomas's desires while advancing her own revenge plan. 
Tension in Character Relationships
Thomas is caught between his love for his mother and his desire for Elena, and his heart is full of struggles. Elena plays the role of a perfect assistant in front of the Lawrence couple, but has ulterior motives behind their backs. The character relationships are complex and full of tension.
Scene Features
From the luxurious ocean - blue villa to the cold hospital ward, and then to the mysterious digital ocean, the scenes are rich and diverse. The descriptions of scenes such as the study and the kitchen are detailed, making players feel as if they are on the scene. 
Immersive Experience
Players will follow Thomas's perspective to deeply experience the emotional entanglement and revenge story between him and Elena. The plot is compact and full of suspense, making players immerse themselves in it and find it hard to extricate themselves.
High - Definition Visual Performance
The game uses high - definition graphics to delicately show the characters' expressions and scene details. Whether it's Elena's gentle charm or Thomas's innocent impulse, they can be vividly presented through the screen. 
Functional Gameplay Features
It supports offline play, allowing players to immerse themselves in the story anytime and anywhere. The one - key backtracking function makes it convenient for players to review important plots, and the auto - play function makes reading smoother. It also provides chapter browsing and high - definition CGs to bring a better reading experience to players.
description_short: At the age of 22, Thomas was killed with hatred after his stepmother and aunt conspired to seize his inheritance. However, he was reborn as a super digital life form. He recalled his past with his tutor, Elena, from innocence to madness three years ago...
